Event: Mushroom Loot - February 2026
Event Date: 09/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR383
Supreme Germination Plate Mail

Once in a while, the armor's wearer gains a shield that blocks 60% damage of any type. The shield exists up to 3 sec. Whenever the unit takes damage while the shield is active, they restore 30% health to self, petrify 2 random enemy units for 3 sec., and deal 123100 physical damage to all enemy units that are petrified or turned into rocks. For 3 sec., the petrified enemy units are unable to move, and take 25% more damage. The ability's effects trigger at most once per 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
